ART.description: Drawing and painting give me a quiet, creative outlet away from screens and spreadsheets. I enjoy experimenting with sketching, colour, and mixed media in my free time.

Badminton.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><ellipse cx="8" cy="8" rx="4" ry="5"/><line x1="11" y1="12" x2="17" y2="18"/><line x1="17" y1="18" x2="19" y2="20"/><path d="M18 4l-1.5 3"/><path d="M18 4l1.5 3"/><path d="M18 4v3"/><path d="M16.5 7l-1 2"/><path d="M19.5 7l1 2"/><path d="M15.5 9l2.5 4 2.5-4"/></svg>
Badminton.description: A racquet sport I picked up as a way to stay active and sharpen reflexes. I play regularly with friends and colleagues on weekends — it's fast, competitive, and a great stress reliever.

Clay Sculpting.description: A hands-on, tactile craft I turn to when I want to slow down and make something with my hands — shaping and moulding clay into pottery and small figures.

Table Tennis.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10.5 7.8c-2.9 0-5.3 2.3-5.3 5.4 0 2.5 1.6 4.2 3.9 4.7l-1.4 3.6 1.8.7 1.5-4c2.8-.4 4.8-2.5 4.8-5 0-3.1-2.4-5.4-5.3-5.4z"/><circle cx="16.5" cy="5.5" r="2"/></svg>
Table Tennis.description: Quick reflexes and friendly competition — table tennis is one of my favourite ways to unwind and stay sharp with friends and family.
